Checkout UX/UI Redesign — Annotations

  • Removed "Fulfillment Time" pane heading — replaced by inline question "Pickup or delivery?"
  • Removed "Payment information" pane heading — the card speaks for itself
  • Removed "Delivery Address" pane heading — address form context is obvious
  • Removed "Payment method" sub-label inside payment pane
  • Removed "How would you like to receive your order?" verbose fieldset legend
  • Removed "When would you like your order?" redundant question — merged into one section
  • Changed Radio buttons → pill-toggle switches for pickup/delivery and ASAP/scheduled
  • Changed 200-item flat <select> → grouped time-slot chip grid by day
  • Changed "Stripe Payment Element" → "New card"
  • New Store address + open status shown inline under pickup selection
  • New Delivery address appears with smooth expand transition
  • New Order summary gets sticky sidebar, item count badge, coupon field
  • New Single clear CTA: "Continue to Review"

This mockup shows two states: (1) Pickup selected + ASAP, (2) Delivery selected + Schedule for later. Scroll down.
